name: Dr. Ifeoluwa Adekoya
bio: Ife Adekoya is a Food Safety and Regulatory Systems Consultant dedicated to helping food and agri-food organizations move from compliance to excellence.

With extensive experience in federally regulated food and cannabis processing environments and advanced training in food technology and quality systems, she delivers practical, science-driven solutions that strengthen operations from farm to fork.

She partners with manufacturers and processors to develop clear, audit-ready, and sustainable quality and compliance systems, and collaborates with academic institutions on proposals, research design, and student supervision.
credentials: Professional Agrologist (P.Ag.), Alberta Institute of Agrologists
Published Author (30+ Scholarly Articles & Book Chapters)

name: Dr. Ajibola Oyedeji
bio: Ajibola Oyedeji is a Food Scientist with over ten years of experience in research, quality assurance, product development, and laboratory systems management.
He has led multidisciplinary teams in product development, ISO 17025-compliant laboratory methods design, and quality management system implementation.
With 40+ Web of Science-indexed publications and conference presentations, Ajibola bridges scientific research and practical application across industry, laboratories, and academia.
credentials: ISO 17025 Laboratory Systems & Methods Development Expertise
Author of 40+ Web of Science-Indexed Publications
Advisor in Food Safety, QA & Regulatory Systems
